positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring stylized, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna interwoven with cosmic elements. A central, symmetrical grouping of abstract, stylized woodland creatures (e.g., foxes, deer, owls) are silhouetted against a vibrant, nebula-filled backdrop. The color palette must be deeply saturated jewel tones (indigo, sapphire, emerald, amethyst) mixed with neon cyan and glowing gold accents. Use a flat, high-contrast graphic style with clean lines, strong silhouettes, and deep matte black negative space. The composition should be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. High detail, magical realism, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, grain, noisy, muted colors
